final_explanation:
Based on the AI model's prediction,
The fact that the checking account balance is negative due to a positive directional impact on credit risk, because of this elevated risk profile, is known in the literature as a signal that increases credit risk, and the model also identifies it as a factor that increases risk. [1]
The fact that there is no checking account due to a reduced probability of default, because of this conservative financial behavior, is known in the literature as a signal that decreases credit risk, but the model instead identifies it as a factor that increases risk. [2]
The fact that the loan duration is extended due to a higher probability of being classified as a bad credit risk, because of prolonged repayment periods, is known in the literature as a signal that increases credit risk, and the model also identifies it as a factor that increases risk. [3]
Overall, this applicant is likely to have a high risk of default.

final_explanation_ko:
본 AI가 예측한 결과에 따르면,\n계좌 잔액 부족은 신용 위험 증가의 신호로 인식되며, 본 모델은 이를 위험 증가 요인으로 판단합니다 [1].  
출금 계좌 부재는 채무 불이행 가능성 감소의 신호로 알려져 있지만, 본 모델은 이를 위험 증가 요인으로 해석합니다 [2].  
대출 기간이 길어짐에 따라 신용 등급이 낮아질 위험이 커져 신용 위험 증가 요인으로 간주되며, 본 모델 역시 이를 위험 증가 요인으로 식별합니다 [3].
전반적으로 신용 위험이 높은 수준으로 평가되어 대출 승인 가능성이 낮습니다.
